titleStmt.title: Memorandum by the Director of the Office of Near Eastern and African Affairs ( (Murray) ) to the Under Secretary of State ( (Stettinius))

div.p: Mr. Stettinius: I think you would wish to know that after the meeting of your groupMembers of the projected mission to London. yesterday in the Secretary’s office, Dr. BowmanIsaiah Bowman, president of Johns Hopkins University, Baltimore, Md. and I had a moment to discuss with the Secretary the attached draft text of a joint American-British statement on Palestine. Supra.

As you will recall, you sent the President the substance of such a statement during the Secretary’s absenceSee memorandum by the Under Secretary of State, March 4, p. 586. and the President approved of issuing it after consultation with the British.

During our conversation with the Secretary yesterday on this subject he expressed general approval of the attached form of the statement but suggested that we might hold it for discussion with the British when we get to London.

I think this procedure is a good one, particularly for the purpose of avoiding leaks that are almost inevitable if we start exchanging telegrams with London on this subject. Meanwhile, however, the Secretary said he wished to clear the draft statement in its present form with the President at an early moment, and I have left a copy with him for that purpose.
